title: TDMA rendezvous spec: beacon, drift, join procedures
notes: Updated spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md with detailed beacon format (CBOR+SCHC+CDDL ref), sync states, drift EMA+offset, join flows, SFN wrap, epoch_floor integration, multi-root RPL tiebreak.
